name: meowstic-male
flavor_texts: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust.
The eyeball patterns on the interior of its ears emit psychic energy. It keeps the patterns tightly covered because that power is too immense.
Revealing the eyelike patterns on the insides of its ears will unleash its psychic powers. It normally keeps the patterns hidden, however.
The defensive instinct of the males is strong. It’s when they’re protecting themselves or their partners that they unleash their full power.
text: Meowstic-male is the Constraint Pokémon. It is a psychic-type Pokémon. Abilities: keen-eye, infiltrator, prankster (hidden). Base stats — HP: 74, Attack: 48, Defense: 76, Sp. Atk: 83, Sp. Def: 81, Speed: 104. Evolution line: espurr → meowstic. Lore: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust. The eyeball patterns on the interior of its ears emit psychic energy. It keeps the patterns tightly covered because that power is too immense. Revealing the eyelike patterns on the insides of its ears will unleash its psychic powers. It normally keeps the patterns hidden, however. The defensive instinct of the males is strong. It’s when they’re protecting themselves or their partners that they unleash their full power.
